text:
Fānlīn Medical College (, Bonrin Idai—lit. "Bonrin Medical University") is a college that specializes in the educational teaching of the medical field. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 215 

Overview

It can be speculated that the Fānlīn Medical College college is one of the best medical colleges in the world as it was recommended by none other than Chairman Netero of the Hunter Association. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

By Chairman Netero's recommendation, Dr. Lee accompanied by a team of surgeons and artificial organ specialists from the Fānlīn Medical College were assembled to help the dying Chimera Ant Queen. Wasting no time upon their arrival, they immediately try to save the dying Queen's life but to no avail. 

Trivia

The name of the place is transliterated as Bonrin Medical School in Crunchyroll's version/translation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 92 (2011) 

Translations around the World

References
